creator: gibbs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Does this problem persist with newer versions of FreeBSD?  Can you 
provide a log of the errors you see when the tape drive does not 
function?  These errors should be reported by the utility you use 
to access the device and may be complemented by errors reported 
by the scsi controller in /var/log/messages.
